description: 飞书身份认证 — 基于飞书 OAuth 的模型访问通道, enabling team members to use AI models via Feishu SSO without managing API keys

userStories.title: Create feishu-server package with wellknown endpoint
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a server package that serves /.well-known/opencode endpoint with auth command and provider configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/feishu-server/ with package.json, tsconfig.json
Implement Bun.serve() HTTP server with configurable port
GET /.well-known/opencode returns JSON with auth.command (['opencode', 'feishu-auth', '--issuer', '<issuer_url>', '--app-id', '<app_id>']), auth.env, and config.provider fields
config.provider contains anthropic and openai entries with baseURL pointing to internal proxy addresses
Server reads ISSUER_URL, APP_ID, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, OPENAI_BASE_URL from environment variables
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Server code in packages/feishu-server. Use Bun.serve(). Simple JSON endpoint.

userStories.title: JWT issuer service - auth code to JWT exchange
userStories.description: As a system, I need a POST /auth/token endpoint that receives a Feishu auth code, exchanges it for user info server-side, and issues a RS256 JWT.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /auth/token accepts { code, redirect_uri } body
Validates redirect_uri against whitelist (http://localhost:19876-19885/oauth/callback)
Server-side: obtains app_access_token via POST /open-apis/auth/v3/app_access_token/internal with app_id + app_secret
Server-side: exchanges auth code for user_access_token via POST /open-apis/authen/v1/oidc/access_token
Server-side: fetches user info (name, email, open_id) via GET /open-apis/authen/v1/user_info
Signs RS256 JWT with payload: sub (open_id), email, name, exp (48h default), iat
Returns JSON: { jwt, refresh_token, expires_at, name, email }
RSA private key and app_secret loaded from environment variables
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Feishu OAuth server-side flow: app_access_token → user_access_token → user_info → sign JWT. refresh_token is the Feishu user_access_token's refresh_token.

userStories.title: JWT refresh service
userStories.description: As a system, I need a POST /auth/refresh endpoint that accepts expired JWTs with refresh tokens and issues new JWTs.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /auth/refresh accepts { refresh_token } body with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> header
Verifies JWT signature but skips exp check (allows expired tokens)
Confirms sub in JWT matches the refresh_token's associated user
Server-side: refreshes Feishu token via POST /open-apis/authen/v1/oidc/refresh_access_token
Signs and returns new JWT with updated exp
Returns JSON: { jwt, refresh_token, expires_at }
Returns specific error code/message when refresh_token is expired (30 days)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: JWT verify with { ignoreExpiration: true }. Feishu refresh_token valid ~30 days.

userStories.title: Reverse proxy with JWT verification
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a reverse proxy that verifies JWT Bearer tokens and forwards requests to model providers with real API keys injected.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates Authorization: Bearer <JWT> using RSA public key on every request
Invalid or expired JWT returns HTTP 401 with clear error message
Replaces Authorization header with real provider API key from config
Routes /v1/anthropic/* to api.anthropic.com, /v1/openai/* to api.openai.com
SSE streaming responses passed through without body parsing (pipe upstream response directly)
Provider API keys and upstream URLs configurable via environment variables
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: SSE passthrough: pipe upstream response body to client. No body transformation. RSA public key from env var or file.

userStories.title: feishu-auth.json schema and storage utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a zod schema and read/write/remove utilities for Feishu auth metadata storage.
acceptanceCriteria: Define zod schema: { refresh_token: string, expires_at: number, name: string, email: string, wellknown_url: string }
Implement read function: loads from <Global.Path.data>/feishu-auth.json, validates with schema, returns null if missing or invalid
Implement write function: validates data and writes to <Global.Path.data>/feishu-auth.json atomically
Implement remove function: deletes feishu-auth.json if it exists
Place in packages/opencode/src/auth/ or alongside existing auth code
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: feishu-auth.json lives in Global.Path.data alongside auth.json. Independent schema, does NOT modify existing WellKnown auth schema.

userStories.title: feishu-auth CLI subcommand - OAuth flow
userStories.description: As a system, I need a CLI subcommand that starts a local callback server, opens the browser for Feishu OAuth, and captures the auth code.
acceptanceCriteria: Register 'feishu-auth' subcommand in packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/
Accept --issuer and --app-id arguments via yargs
Support FEISHU_BASE_URL env var (default: open.feishu.cn)
Start local HTTP callback server with dynamic port (try 19876, increment to 19885 if occupied)
Construct Feishu OAuth URL: https://{BASE_URL}/open-apis/authen/v1/authorize?app_id={APP_ID}&redirect_uri=...&state={UUID}&scope=contact:user.email:readonly
Open browser to authorization URL
Receive callback, strictly validate state parameter (CSRF prevention)
Display success/failure HTML page in browser
5-minute timeout with clear error message
If all 10 ports (19876-19885) occupied, report error and exit
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use Bun.serve() for callback. crypto.randomUUID() for state. Dynamic port allocation with 10-port range.

userStories.title: feishu-auth CLI subcommand - token exchange and output
userStories.description: As a system, I need the feishu-auth subcommand to exchange the auth code for a JWT via the issuer service and output it.
acceptanceCriteria: After receiving auth code, POST to {issuer}/auth/token with { code, redirect_uri }
Output JWT string to stdout (only JWT, no other output, for wellknown mechanism consumption)
Write refresh_token, expires_at, name, email, wellknown_url to feishu-auth.json using US-005 utilities
Handle issuer service errors (network, non-2xx, invalid JSON) with clear messages to stderr
Register subcommand in src/index.ts command chain
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: JWT goes to stdout only. Metadata to feishu-auth.json. Errors to stderr. wellknown_url derived from --issuer.

userStories.title: Plugin - token auto-refresh via chat.headers hook
userStories.description: As a system, I need automatic JWT refresh before expiry so users don't need to re-login within the 30-day refresh window.
acceptanceCriteria: Register chat.headers hook that runs on every model request
Decode JWT payload (base64url decode, no crypto verification needed for reading exp)
When JWT expires within 5 minutes, trigger refresh
Read refresh_token from feishu-auth.json
Call POST {issuer}/auth/refresh with current JWT as Bearer header and { refresh_token } body
On success update three locations: (1) process.env[key] with new JWT, (2) auth.json wellknown entry token, (3) feishu-auth.json metadata
Concurrent refresh requests coalesced into single call (store in-flight promise, return same for concurrent callers)
When refresh_token expired (30 days), prompt user to run 'opencode auth login' and do not block current request
Refresh is transparent, does not interrupt current session
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Promise dedup pattern: store pending refresh promise, return same promise for concurrent calls. Three-way update on success. Issuer URL from wellknown config or feishu-auth.json.

userStories.title: auth list - display Feishu user info
userStories.description: As a team member, I want opencode auth list to show my Feishu username and email for easy account identification.
acceptanceCriteria: auth list checks for feishu-auth.json when displaying wellknown entries
If feishu-auth.json exists with name and email, display as 'Feishu oauth ({name} / {email})'
If feishu-auth.json missing or user info incomplete, fallback to existing wellknown display format
Does not affect display of other provider types
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Minimal change to auth list display logic. Match wellknown entry by wellknown_url from feishu-auth.json.

userStories.title: auth logout - cleanup feishu-auth.json
userStories.description: As a team member, I want logout to also remove Feishu metadata when I remove my Feishu credentials.
acceptanceCriteria: When removing a wellknown auth entry via logout, check if feishu-auth.json exists
If exists and wellknown_url matches the removed entry, delete feishu-auth.json
Minimal change (~5 lines) to existing logout flow
Existing logout behavior unchanged for non-Feishu entries
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use remove() from US-005. Minimal extension to existing logout logic.

userStories.title: Wellknown fetch error handling
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear error messages when the wellknown endpoint is unreachable or returns invalid data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add error handling to auth login wellknown fetch and config.ts startup wellknown fetch
Network/DNS failure: '无法连接到 {url}，请检查网络或 URL 是否正确'
HTTP non-2xx: '服务端返回错误 ({status})，请联系管理员'
Invalid JSON response: '服务端返回格式异常，请联系管理员检查 /.well-known/opencode 配置'
Request timeout (10s via AbortController): '连接超时，请检查网络'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Fix both auth login and config.ts fetch paths. Use AbortController with 10s timeout signal.

userStories.title: auth.command execution error handling
userStories.description: As a user, I want helpful error messages when the auth command fails, especially version incompatibility hints.
acceptanceCriteria: When auth.command exits with non-zero code, display friendly error message
If stderr contains 'unknown command' or similar, show: '当前 opencode 版本不支持此认证方式，请升级到最新版本'
Other non-zero exit codes show stderr content as error detail
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Modify auth login flow where auth.command is spawned. Check exit code and stderr content.
